languages.text: Бледный свет люменов рассеивает темноту. Всюду видны следы схватки: отметины выстрелов, разгромленная мебель и блеклые пятна засохшей крови. Участь членов экипажа остается загадкой — отсеки корабля пустуют. Последний отчет с борта загадочного корабля приходит после необычно долгой паузы: согласно донесениям, с мостика судна эхом доносится визгливый плач.

traits.locale_text: Бледный свет люменов рассеивает темноту. Всюду видны следы схватки: отметины выстрелов, разгромленная мебель и блеклые пятна засохшей крови. Участь членов экипажа остается загадкой — отсеки корабля пустуют. Последний отчет с борта загадочного корабля приходит после необычно долгой паузы: согласно донесениям, с мостика судна эхом доносится визгливый плач.

languages.text: The pale light of the lumens dispels the darkness. There are signs of a struggle everywhere: gunshot marks, destroyed furniture, and faded stains of dried blood. The fate of the crew remains a mystery — the ship's compartments are empty. The latest report from aboard the mysterious ship comes after an unusually long pause: the echo of a high-pitched cry has been heard coming from the ship's bridge.

languages.text: 苍白的流明灯驱散了黑暗。四下满是搏斗的痕迹：弹痕、毁坏的家具，还有干涸变淡的血迹。至于船员的下场，依旧是个谜——船上所有舱室都空无一人。在异常漫长的沉寂之后，那艘神秘船只终于传来最新消息：有人听见舰桥那边传来尖锐刺耳的惨叫回音。
languages.original_text: The pale light of the lumens dispels the darkness. There are signs of a struggle everywhere: gunshot marks, destroyed furniture, and faded stains of dried blood. The fate of the crew remains a mystery — the ship's compartments are empty. The latest report from aboard the mysterious ship comes after an unusually long pause: the echo of a high-pitched cry has been heard coming from the ship's bridge.

traits.locale_text: 苍白的流明灯驱散了黑暗。四下满是搏斗的痕迹：弹痕、毁坏的家具，还有干涸变淡的血迹。至于船员的下场，依旧是个谜——船上所有舱室都空无一人。在异常漫长的沉寂之后，那艘神秘船只终于传来最新消息：有人听见舰桥那边传来尖锐刺耳的惨叫回音。

languages.text: La luz pálida de los lumens atraviesa la oscuridad. Hay signos de lucha por todas partes: marcas de disparos, mobiliario destrozado y manchas emborronadas de sangre seca. El destino de la tripulación sigue siendo desconocido; los compartimentos de la nave están vacíos. El último informe desde la nave misteriosa llega tras una pausa especialmente larga: han oído el eco de un chillido desde el puente.
languages.original_text: The pale light of the lumens dispels the darkness. There are signs of a struggle everywhere: gunshot marks, destroyed furniture, and faded stains of dried blood. The fate of the crew remains a mystery — the ship's compartments are empty. The latest report from aboard the mysterious ship comes after an unusually long pause: the echo of a high-pitched cry has been heard coming from the ship's bridge.

traits.locale_text: La luz pálida de los lumens atraviesa la oscuridad. Hay signos de lucha por todas partes: marcas de disparos, mobiliario destrozado y manchas emborronadas de sangre seca. El destino de la tripulación sigue siendo desconocido; los compartimentos de la nave están vacíos. El último informe desde la nave misteriosa llega tras una pausa especialmente larga: han oído el eco de un chillido desde el puente.

languages.text: La lumière blafarde des lumens disperse les ténèbres. Les signes de lutte sont partout : des impacts de balles, le mobilier détruit, et des traces à demi effacées de sang séché. Ce qu'il est advenu de l'équipage demeure un mystère : les compartiments sont vides. Après une attente anormalement longue, des nouvelles parviennent du vaisseau mystérieux : l'écho d'un cri aigu a retenti depuis la passerelle du vaisseau.
languages.original_text: The pale light of the lumens dispels the darkness. There are signs of a struggle everywhere: gunshot marks, destroyed furniture, and faded stains of dried blood. The fate of the crew remains a mystery — the ship's compartments are empty. The latest report from aboard the mysterious ship comes after an unusually long pause: the echo of a high-pitched cry has been heard coming from the ship's bridge.

Après une attente anormalement longue, des nouvelles parviennent du vaisseau mystérieux : l'écho d'un cri aigu a retenti depuis la passerelle du vaisseau.

languages.text: Lümenlerin soluk ışığı karanlığı dağıtıyor. Her yerde mücadele izleri var: Silah atışları, parçalanmış eşyalar ve kurumuş kandan kalan soluk lekeler. Mürettebatın kaderi, gizemini korumayı sürdürüyor. Geminin bölmeleri boş. Gizemli gemiye dair son rapor, alışılmadık derecede uzun bir duraklamadan sonra geliyor: Geminin köprüsünden tiz bir çığlığın yankısı duyulmuş.
languages.original_text: The pale light of the lumens dispels the darkness. There are signs of a struggle everywhere: gunshot marks, destroyed furniture, and faded stains of dried blood. The fate of the crew remains a mystery — the ship's compartments are empty. The latest report from aboard the mysterious ship comes after an unusually long pause: the echo of a high-pitched cry has been heard coming from the ship's bridge.

Mürettebatın kaderi, gizemini korumayı sürdürüyor. Geminin bölmeleri boş. languages.text: Das fahle Licht der Lumen durchschneidet die Dunkelheit. Überall sind Kampfspuren zu sehen. Einschüsse, zerstörte Möbel und die verblassten Spuren von getrocknetem Blut. Das Schicksal der Crew bleibt ein Geheimnis ... alle Module des Schiffs sind leer. Der neueste Bericht von dem mysteriösen Schiff trifft nach einer ungewöhnlich langen Pause ein: Von der Brücke des Schiffes war das Echo eines schrillen Schreis ertönt.
languages.original_text: The pale light of the lumens dispels the darkness. There are signs of a struggle everywhere: gunshot marks, destroyed furniture, and faded stains of dried blood. The fate of the crew remains a mystery — the ship's compartments are empty. The latest report from aboard the mysterious ship comes after an unusually long pause: the echo of a high-pitched cry has been heard coming from the ship's bridge.

traits.locale_text: Das fahle Licht der Lumen durchschneidet die Dunkelheit. Überall sind Kampfspuren zu sehen. Einschüsse, zerstörte Möbel und die verblassten Spuren von getrocknetem Blut. Das Schicksal der Crew bleibt ein Geheimnis ... alle Module des Schiffs sind leer. Der neueste Bericht von dem mysteriösen Schiff trifft nach einer ungewöhnlich langen Pause ein: Von der Brücke des Schiffes war das Echo eines schrillen Schreis ertönt.

languages.text: 船内は、ルミナスと呼ばれる淡い光で照らされている。銃弾の痕跡、破壊された家具、乾いた血の跡など、激しい戦いの痕跡が至る所に散らばっている。乗組員の運命は謎のまま。船の各区画は空っぽだ。謎の船からの最新報告は、異例の長い沈黙の後。船橋から、高音の叫び声が聞こえてきた。
languages.original_text: The pale light of the lumens dispels the darkness. There are signs of a struggle everywhere: gunshot marks, destroyed furniture, and faded stains of dried blood. The fate of the crew remains a mystery — the ship's compartments are empty. The latest report from aboard the mysterious ship comes after an unusually long pause: the echo of a high-pitched cry has been heard coming from the ship's bridge.
